title: Kumar's Succession Plan
description: A narrative about mentorship, letting go, choosing a successor.
summary_pt_br: Sucessão: 'Pronto pra o que não faço mais', 'Meu trabalho é diminuir meu trabalho', 'Faça sua'.

scenes.subtitle_en: A narrative about mentorship, letting go, choosing a successor.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Sucessão: 'Pronto pra o que não faço mais', 'Meu trabalho é diminuir meu trabalho', 'Faça sua'.

scenes.text_en: A narrative about mentorship, letting go, choosing a successor. Focus: kumar's succession plan. You are ready for what I cannot do anymore.
scenes.text_pt: Sucessão: 'Pronto pra o que não faço mais', 'Meu trabalho é diminuir meu trabalho', 'Faça sua'. Foco: kumar's succession plan. Você está pronta pro que não faço mais.

scenes.title: Kumar's Succession Plan
scenes.body_en: Succession language: 'You are ready for what I cannot do anymore', 'My job is to shrink my job', 'Make it yours, not mine', 'I am proud to step aside'.
scenes.body_pt: Sucessão: 'Pronto pra o que não faço mais', 'Meu trabalho é diminuir meu trabalho', 'Faça sua'.

examples.en: You are ready for what I cannot do anymore.
examples.pt: Você está pronta pro que não faço mais.

examples.en: My job from now on is to shrink my own job.
examples.pt: Minha função agora é diminuir minha própria função.

examples.en: Make this school yours, not mine.
examples.pt: Faça desta escola sua, não minha.

exercise.question: Complete: "You are ready for what I cannot do ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "You are ready for what I cannot do anymore."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Você está pronta pro que não faço mais.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
My job from now on is to shrink my own job.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "My job from now on is to shrink my own job."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Minha função agora é diminuir minha própria função.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Kumar's Succession Plan — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre kumar's succession plan. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Kumar, why now for this conversation?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Because you are ready for what I cannot do anymore.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What will you miss most about the role?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The students who arrived frightened and left brave.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Make this school yours, not mine.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: And if I make a decision you would not have?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Good. That is how schools grow.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What's your one piece of advice for the next decade?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Protect the teachers. They protect everything else.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Succession is the last curriculum a founder writes.

scenes.title: The passing of the keys
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Kumar's message. Use at least three succession phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the same office where he had first hired her, Kumar handed the school's keys to its second principal.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: You are ready for what I cannot do anymore — and that is the best definition of succession I know.

paragraphs.speaker: Successor
paragraphs.en: I am honored, but I worry I won't carry the culture exactly as you built it over these years.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Make this school yours, not mine. A legacy not revised by the next steward is not a legacy — it's a fossil.

paragraphs.speaker: Successor
paragraphs.en: Thank you. My first decision is to keep Thursdays sacred, exactly as you always did.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Succession, Kumar believed, is the quietest act of leadership — and the hardest one to do well.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Kumar's Succession Plan". A narrative about mentorship, letting go, choosing a successor. You are ready for what I cannot do anymore. My job from now on is to shrink my own job. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Kumar's Succession Plan". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Kumar's Succession Plan".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Kumar's Succession Plan".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
